audit_items.proof_trace: The property is enforced by an explicit revert guard at lines 346-348: `availableAssetUsdValue = (eligibleAssets[i].amount * assetPrice) / (10 ** assetDecimals); if (availableAssetUsdValue < assetParams.minAuctionSizeUsd) revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize(...)`. This check runs before `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` (line 353), so no auction can start without satisfying the threshold. The price is fetched fresh at performUpkeep time (line 342), covering price-drop TOCTOU; and any inflated `amount` in performData would cause `transferForSwap` to revert on ERC20 underflow (Solidity 0.8.26) before the guard is even reached.
